steps.title: Show a concession
steps.content: The first sentence says the 1920 method seems rudimentary today. The next sentence says a far more advanced 2015 study found a nearly identical center, showing the old method was accurate.

steps.title: Signal the pivot
steps.content: A signals a consequence, C signals a restatement, and D signals an example, but the second sentence qualifies the first by adding surprising evidence. The needed transition acknowledges the first point and pivots to the accuracy evidence. The answer is B.
